settings.title: Description
settings.content: Premium quality underwear crafted from sustainably sourced materials. Designed in Singapore for the tropical climate.

settings.title: Care
settings.content: Machine wash cold (30°C). Tumble dry low. Do not bleach. Do not iron print.

settings.title: Shipping
settings.content: Free shipping on orders over $50 within Singapore. Standard delivery 2–4 business days. International shipping available.
